docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-26-2021 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,075.00 FILED BY HUNG, MEI AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $30.00 - SERVED FEB-26-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, DAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUNG, MEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIU, DAN SEE ATTACHMENT MC-025 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-26-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-26-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MEI HUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAN LIU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER CONNIE CHUNG VIA ZOOM. THIS CASE IS HEARD WITH CSM-20-863893 & 20-863868. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
